posts.author: AdeleBrown (Adele Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
Outlook Calendar Integration:
Can only colour code calendar by group, person, status - I want to colour by tag…
Want o group calendar items by type
How to automate a move to Archive group if meeting cancelled - so the requirement is to be able to search for a string and then do something based on the string existing.
